name: Peanut Butter - Fudge Marble Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Fudge marble cake mix (18.25 to 19.75 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease and flour two 8- or 9-inch round baking pans.
3. Prepare the cake batters according to the package directions using the eggs, 2 tbsp oil, and water.
4. Melt the peanut butter chips with 2 tbsp oil:
a. In a double boiler over hot (not boiling) water, stir constantly until melted and smooth.
OR
b. Place the chips and oil in a small microwave-safe bowl, then microwave on HIGH for 45 seconds, stirring if necessary. If needed, continue microwaving for an additional 15 seconds or until smooth when stirred.
5. Gradually add the melted peanut butter to the vanilla batter, blending well.
6. Pour the peanut butter batter into the prepared pans.
7. Randomly place spoonfuls of the chocolate batter on top and swirl as directed on the cake package.
8. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool 15 minutes in the pans on a wire rack, then remove from the pans and cool completely.
10. Frost as desired.
